title: Tertiary Education | Beehive.govt.nz
content:
## Tertiary Research Excellence Fund focused on driving economic growth
The introduction of the new Tertiary Research Excellence Fund (TREF) will direct research effort towards economic growth while cutting red tape.

## New Appointment to Tertiary Education Commission Board
Tertiary Education Minister Penny Simmonds has announced the appointment of Michelle Findlater to the Board of the Tertiary Education Commission.
